synopsis:
Synopsis 1
Filer: Direxion Shares ETF Trust
ETF Name: Direxion Daily Anduril Bull 2X ETF / Direxion Daily Anduril Bear 2X ETF
Strategy: Single-stock leveraged ETFs seeking daily investment results of +200% (Bull) and –200% (Bear) the daily performance of Anduril Industries common shares, using swaps, derivatives, and at least 80% of net assets in Anduril securities or instruments referencing them. Designed exclusively for active, sophisticated traders who monitor and manage positions daily, not for buy-and-hold investors.
IS ALERT WORTHY: HIGH

Why this matters:
- Captured for ETF desk triage and potential wire follow-up.
- Escalate when the filing changes strategy, structure, exposure, or launch timing.
